title: Citation-aware Rubric Rewards for Deep Search Agents
task: reinforcement learning for deep search agents

defines.name: CaRR
defines.definition: Citation-aware Rubric Rewards is a fine-grained reward framework that evaluates deep search agent trajectories by decomposing questions into verifiable rubrics and checking factual grounding, comprehensiveness, and evidence connectivity.

defines.name: C-GRPO
defines.definition: Citation-aware Group Relative Policy Optimization is a mixed-reward RL algorithm that combines citation-aware rubric rewards with outcome rewards to train robust deep search agents.

problem: Binary outcome rewards do not capture the comprehensiveness and factuality of deep search agents’ reasoning, enabling shortcut exploitation and hallucinations.
